body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Fixes misleading tests, closes coverage gaps, and removes dead code.

- **dense_output**: rewrote to test the real `sol(t)` nearest-neighbor contract — the old tests claimed linear interpolation (which CTS doesn't do) and were vacuous.
- **MPI CI**: the "callbacks (MPI)" job ran single-rank; now launches 2 ranks via `srun` so the distributed `EveryXWallTimeSeconds` path is actually exercised.
- **CPU CI**: added steps for `forward_diff`, `jacobian_update`, `cache_sizes` (previously only run locally/on GPU).
- **integrator API**: added tests for `advance_to_tstop`, two-arg `step!(integrator, dt, stop_at_tdt)`, and the error branches.
- **type stability**: replaced solver smoke tests with `JET.@test_opt` on each solver's `step_u!` (adds JET to test deps; covers IMEX SSPRK too).
- **dead code**: removed `all_test_cases` and the unused `IntegratorTestCase` fields `default_num_steps`/`high_order_sample_shifts`.

There're also two source code change to make Rosenbrock and multirate solvers allocation-free
- Avoid materializing a slice of the tableau in Rosenbrock solvers to make them allocation-free
- Make multirate solver allocation free (required changing `SortedQueue` argument from keyword to positional
title: Test suite improvements
